creator: r4721@tormail.org
text:
the MOVED entry for graphics/linux_dri and graphics/linux_dri74 simply says 'Removed' with no replacement port specified. correct entry to have removal reason and the replacement port (graphics/linux-f10-dri).

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=322234

there are 185 ports in MOVED that say just 'Removed'. please fill the comment field with the reason when removing a port.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
